revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{commonscat}} {{catmore}} [[Category:アジア史 (時代別)|こたい]] [[Category:古代史|あしあ]]」
removed [[Category:Ancient history by region]]; added [[Category:Ancient history by continent]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
1 revision imported
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]] to [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Removing from [[Category:Dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

removing these two bullshit categories
revision.text:
[[Asia]] in [[Ancient history|antiquity]].
{{Commons category|Ancient Asia}}
[[Category:History of Asia by period|*]] [[Category:Ancient history by continent|Asia]] [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]]
[[en:Category:Ancient Asia]][[Category:Categories from wikipedia]]
[[en:Category:Ancient Asia]][[en:Ancient Asia]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (7 members)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki linked categories]][[en:Category:"
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:古代アジア]] [[ab:Category:Ажәытәӡатәи Азиа]] [[ar:Category:آسيا القديمة]] [[az:Category:Qədim Asiya]] [[ba:Category:Боронғо Азия]] [[be_x_old:Category:Старажытная Азія]] [[be:Category:Старажытная Азія]] [[bn:Category:প্রাচীন এশিয়া]] [[ce:Category:Шира Ази]] [[ckb:Category:ئاسیای دێرین]] [[commons:Category:Ancient Asia]] [[cv:Category:Авалхи Ази]] [[el:Category:Αρχαία Ασία]] [[eo:Category:Antikva Azio]] [[es:Category:Historia antigua de Asia]] [[et:Category:Aasia vanaaeg]] [[eu:Category:Antzinaroko Asia]] [[fa:Category:آسیای باستان]] [[hi:Category:प्राचीन एशिया]] [[hy:Category:Հին Ասիա]] [[id:Category:Asia Kuno]] [[ilo:Category:Taga-ugma nga Asia]] [[ka:Category:ძველი აზია]] [[ko:Category:아시아의 고대사]] [[ku:Category:Asyaya kevnare]] [[ml:Category:പുരാതന ഏഷ്യ]] [[ms:Category:Asia purba]] [[nn:Category:Asia i antikken]] [[pa:Category:ਪ੍ਰਾਚੀਨ ਏਸ਼ੀਆ]] [[ru:Category:Древняя Азия]] [[sd:Category:قديم ايشيا]] [[tg:Category:Осиёи қадим]] [[tr:Category:Antik Asya tarihi]] [[uk:Category:Стародавня Азія]] [[ur:Category:قدیم ایشیا]] [[uz:Category:Qadimgi Osiyo]] [[vi:Category:Châu Á cổ đại]] [[zh:Category:亚洲古代史]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Classical_Japan]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7721711)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Commons category|Ancient Asia}} {{wikidata link|Q7721711}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Ancient Asia]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Ancient history by continent|Asia]] [[Category:History of Asia by period|*]]
